title: Placement Bootcamps: Scaling Technical Training
excerpt: Behind the scenes of our recent EETIRP placement bootcamp. Key strategies on teaching data modeling, microservice routers, and system designs.
content: Today we conducted a placement bootcamp covering fullstack routes, Express middlewares, and mock interview preparations. Over 50 students successfully connected their local repositories to our assessment databases!

title: Butterfly AI: Deploying Adaptive Mock Simulators
excerpt: How we developed an adaptive mock interview model. Technical challenges in handling prompt tokens, real-time logging, and score dashboards.
content: We have successfully deployed a beta test of Butterfly AI, suggesting lessons based on student test scores. The API routes maintain secure JWT verification and achieve less than 80ms latency.

title: Java Foundations: Cracking Object-Oriented Loops
excerpt: Common Java interview patterns that trip up graduates. A review of garbage collection logic, threading, interfaces, and memory models.
content: A complete roadmap detailing the primary Java OOP patterns, memory profiles, and multithreading schemas frequently checked during technical evaluations at leading firms.
